## Qaid v0.5.1 — Refinements

Internal cleanup and polish from a whole-codebase audit. No gameplay changes; sets the stage for the next mode (Baloot).

### Improved

- **Sharper shared images** — the game-summary PNG now renders at the device pixel ratio (capped 3×), so shares look crisp on Retina / high-DPI phones instead of soft.
- **More robust sharing** — `canvas.toBlob` is guarded with a timeout so the share flow can't hang; icon generation reports failures instead of crashing opaquely.

### Internal

- **`<BottomSheet>` + `<SheetFooter>` extracted** — the modal shell (scrim, focus trap, scroll lock, Esc-to-close) and the Cancel/Save footer were copy-pasted across all 7 sheets. Now centralized; the seven sheets render content-only. Net ~120 fewer lines.
- **Registry-driven score scope** — a single `SCORE_SCOPE` source of truth (engine) feeds both the scoring engine and the game registry, so a future team-scored mode can't be silently tallied per-player.
- **GameMode exhaustiveness guard** — `checkWinner` and `startGame` now fail to compile if a new mode is added without a branch.

### State shape

No changes. `cardScoreTracker_v1` key and shape are unchanged.

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 236/236 passing
- `npm run build` succeeds — prompt-mode service worker, 17-entry Workbox precache
- RoundSheet, ConfirmSheet, and the round/confirm flows verified in a live preview (no console errors; DOM/ARIA preserved)
